title: Canza kalmar shiga
subtitle: Sabunta tsaron asusun ku
currentPasswordPlaceholder: Shigar da kalmar wucewa ta yanzu
requirements: Dole ne ya ƙunshi haruffa 8+, babban baƙaƙe, ƙarami, lamba, da sigar musamman

messages.success: An sabunta kalmar wucewa cikin nasara!
messages.error: An sami kuskure Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
messages.mismatch: Sabbin kalmomin shiga ba su daidaita ba
messages.invalid: Dole ne kalmar wucewa ta ƙunshi aƙalla haruffa 8, babba ɗaya, ƙarami ɗaya, lamba ɗaya da harafi na musamman ɗaya
